stemHtml: What happens following a total centre tank fuel pump failure?

options.a: Fuel starvation could lead to an engine flameout.
options.b: All or part of the fuel in the centre tank may be unusable.
options.c: Deployment of the ram air turbine (RAT) should be initiated to activate the back-up fuel pumps.
options.d: The fuel control panel should be placed in manual mode, and fuel fed from the outer wing tanks first.
